name: MemeGen
short: Post memes on command or on a timer.
description: Fetch memes from meme-api.com (Reddit) on command, or auto-post into a channel on an interval. Configurable subreddit sources. Opt-in per guild, bilingual (DE/EN), with web dashboard integration.
author: Domekologe
install_msg:
Thanks for installing MemeGen!

Load it with `[p]load memegen`, then configure it via its commands or the PDC web dashboard (if installed).
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not persistently store any personal data about users. It stores only per-server configuration.
